        hash_cond=(o.customer_id = c.id)

            buffers: shared hit=31 read=0

Summary
  Slowest node (exclusive):  [3] Hash Join — 0.8ms (30% of total)
  Biggest row misestimate:   [2] Sort — planned 4,188, actual 42 (99.7× over)

Findings

            └─ table_bloat
               Scan reads 379 blocks (3.0 MB) for 12500 rows — approximately 248 bytes per row. This may indicate table bloat or dead tuples.
